staticText: Route users to the browser-local Crypto Exchange Due-Diligence Evidence Workbook without requesting, prefilling, repeating or transmitting provider names, countries, dates, source URLs or notes. The workbook compares evidence coverage for two user-named providers and never produces a trust score, ranking, safety verdict, licensing verdict, current-fee claim, recommendation or endorsement. Do not choose or prefill a provider. Never ask for or echo a password, private key, seed phrase, account number, identity document or support secret.
